comment: Klang — ring modulator + frequency shifter. Mode sweeps Ring (in*carrier sidebands) / Shift-Up / Shift-Down (single-sideband Hilbert frequency shifting). Carrier frequency, an optional sweep LFO, and stereo spread. Metallic, clangy, inharmonic textures. Desktop preview implements the full DSP; pedal C port is staged.
fxid_comment: 0x01C7. Above the repo's used range; distinct from the other customs (450-454). Verify uniqueness before flashing.

params.name: Freq
params.comment: Carrier / shift frequency, ~0.5..2000 Hz (log). Low = tremolo-ish, high = metallic.

params.name: Mode
params.comment: 0-33 Ring mod, 34-66 Shift Up, 67-100 Shift Down.

params.name: Sweep
params.comment: LFO that moves the carrier frequency for siren/warble motion.

params.name: Spread
params.comment: Stereo: detunes the carrier between L/R for width.

audio_nop_comment: Pedal C port starts as a UI-only smoke build; full DSP validated on desktop first.
